title: Enchantment Scraping
description: This mod allows you to scrape enchantments from items to books with help of scraping instruments
body:
This mod adds four new tools and a stateion to use them on.

Scrapers crafted as follows:
![https://i.imgur.com/sQOs88A.png](https://i.imgur.com/sQOs88A.png)

Scraping station is crafted like this:

![https://i.imgur.com/q9KCLNU.png](https://i.imgur.com/q9KCLNU.png)

Its UI looks like this:

![https://i.imgur.com/WXEFvr8.png](https://i.imgur.com/WXEFvr8.png)

Red is input for enchanted item, purple for books, cyan for scrapers and green is the output slot. When this UI oppened you can see scraping chance for any of scrapers:

![https://i.imgur.com/wLbA8TR.png](https://i.imgur.com/wLbA8TR.png)

Process of scraping takes 10 seconds. If you are somewhat lucky - you will get some of original item's enchantments, if very lucky - all of them and. Othervise you will get empty book.

![https://i.imgur.com/8e1Peyz.png](https://i.imgur.com/8e1Peyz.png) ![https://i.imgur.com/wJuTWPm.png](https://i.imgur.com/wJuTWPm.png) ![https://i.imgur.com/n1MV9fT.png](https://i.imgur.com/n1MV9fT.png)
